policies.title: Refund Eligibility
policies.content: Full refunds available within 30 days of purchase for annual plans and within 14 days for monthly plans. Refunds processed to original payment method within 5-10 business days. Partial refunds considered for service outages exceeding SLA on case-by-case basis.

policies.title: Charge Dispute Process
policies.content: For billing disputes, we investigate within 48 hours. Provide transaction ID and description of dispute. If charge is confirmed erroneous, full refund plus $25 credit applied. Chargebacks filed without contacting support first may result in account review.

policies.title: Partial Refund Policy
policies.content: Partial refunds calculated as: (unused_days / total_days) * amount_paid. Minimum partial refund is $5.00. Pro-rated credits applied to account for mid-cycle downgrades instead of cash refunds when customer retains service.
